construction, there was no significant difference between the experimental and control groups,

                                                      val, and there is no significant difference in the time trend of overinvestment between affected
                                                      and unaffected enterprises. In addition, after the pilot reform of the social credit system, the
                                                      overinvestment of affected enterprises was significantly reduced, which is consistent with the
                                                      benchmark conclusions.
